overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a black futuristic car driving through Night City at night. The vehicle navigates neon-lit commercial streets, elevated highways, industrial districts, and tunnels in a dystopian cyberpunk urban environment with wet reflective roads and heavy neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with elevated highway overhead

agents.ego_description: driving straight through commercial district at moderate speed, passing under elevated highway structures

notable_agents.action: oncoming car approaching from opposite direction

entered.detail: large illuminated sign displaying number 03 on building facade
building covered in bright neon advertisements and signage
massive concrete highway structure running overhead with support columns
tall street lamp with bright overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet neon-lit commercial street at night, with the black futuristic vehicle driving forward beneath an elevated highway. Bright digital billboards and neon building facades illuminate the left side while sparse traffic moves through the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with pedestrian crosswalks and overpass approach

events.description: vehicle approaches and enters large intersection with yellow-striped crosswalks
vehicle makes right turn at intersection, heading toward yellow-lit overpass structure

agents.ego_description: navigating through intersection, making a right turn while avoiding other vehicles and following road markings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along sidewalk near intersection corner

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
large arched overpass with distinctive yellow interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates a major intersection with prominent crosswalk stripes, making a right turn toward a distinctive yellow-lit overpass. The scene transitions from the commercial street to a more open intersection area with traffic lights and crossing pedestrians visible on the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway bridge with concrete barriers and neon signage

events.description: vehicle enters elevated bridge section with concrete safety barriers and overhead highway structures

agents.ego_description: cruising along elevated highway bridge, maintaining steady speed between concrete barriers

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving in opposite lane on the bridge

entered.detail: blue and red neon sign with DTR letters mounted on distant building
tall concrete wall with metal railings separating traffic lanes
massive overhead highway with support beams and lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated highway bridge enclosed by concrete safety barriers, with the distinctive DTR neon sign visible in the distance. The road stretches forward under massive overhead highway structures, with sparse oncoming traffic and the city skyline visible beyond the bridge railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district with warehouse buildings and Night City signage

events.description: vehicle exits elevated highway and enters industrial street with Night City wall sign
vehicle makes sharp right turn onto narrower industrial road

agents.ego_description: exiting the highway and navigating through industrial streets, making turns around warehouse buildings

notable_agents.action: person walking along sidewalk near industrial building entrance

entered.detail: large painted sign reading NIGHT CITY on red brick wall with checkered pattern
large industrial structure with metal siding and loading docks
orange metal scaffolding structure near building facade

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the elevated highway into a narrower industrial district, passing the iconic Night City wall sign. The environment shifts to warehouse buildings, construction scaffolding, and industrial piping, with pedestrians visible on sidewalks and the road winding through the industrial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed tunnel or underpass with concrete walls and industrial piping

events.description: vehicle enters tunnel, transitioning from mixed outdoor lighting to enclosed artificial lighting only

agents.ego_description: driving through enclosed tunnel with concrete walls, following the narrowing road deeper into the underpass

entered.detail: dark opening of tunnel with concrete archway and overhead pipes
smooth concrete walls of the tunnel with industrial fixtures
large industrial pipes and ventilation ducts running along tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a fully enclosed tunnel with smooth concrete walls and overhead industrial piping, transitioning to artificial lighting only. The road narrows as it descends deeper into the underpass, with graffiti visible on the walls and the tunnel stretching ahead into darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a black futuristic vehicle travels from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district into the claustrophobic depths of an industrial tunnel. It begins on a wet city street beneath an elevated highway, where bright digital billboards illuminate the road before the vehicle makes a right turn through a major intersection toward a yellow-lit overpass. The scene then expands onto an elevated highway bridge, gliding past concrete barriers and under massive overhead structures with the city skyline and a distant DTR neon sign visible. As the vehicle exits the highway, the environment shifts into a narrower industrial zone characterized by warehouse buildings, construction scaffolding, and the iconic Night City wall sign. Finally, the road winds deeper into the city, transitioning from the open urban air into a fully enclosed concrete tunnel lined with graffiti and industrial piping that stretches ahead into darkness.
